element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental mechanic, open spaces with minimal threats
Introduced after basic movement established, avoidable initially
Enables vertical exploration and access to new areas
Requires mastery of jump timing and distance

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Steady escalation with alternating challenge and breathing room; early levels teach mechanics in isolation, later levels combine multiple demands

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Elevated areas and hidden chambers accessible via pogo stick jumps or precise positioning
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Alcoves and upper passages often contain collectibles or shortcuts; encourages vertical exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to movement mechanics in open, threat-minimal spaces
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of pogo stick mechanics and spike hazards; increased enemy density and complex platforming sequences
difficulty_curve.late_game: Demanding platforming requiring mastery of momentum, timing, and power-up management; tighter enemy placement
notable_spikes: First encounter with pogo stick requirements
Transition to levels combining multiple hazard types

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels feature wide, uncluttered platforms introducing basic movement without immediate threat
Moderate-difficulty levels present single enemy types in contained areas before escalating to mixed threats
Mid-to-late game levels reward pogo stick mastery with stacked platforms and upper-area secrets
Late-game sequences demand tight timing across spike-laden areas with minimal margin for error

quality_note: Insufficient source data available. The provided TCRF source contains only site navigation and content policy information, with no actual game-specific documentation. Analysis above is based on general platformer conventions and the game's known design paradigm (early 1990s side-scrolling platformer). Recommend accessing actual game documentation, playthrough data, or design interviews for verification.
